title: nephrodium molle var. jamesonii
intro: Nephrodium molle var. jamesonii, also known as Jameson's Lady fern, is a variety of the Lady fern plant, belonging to the Osmundaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Nephrodium molle var. jamesonii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate headaches and joint pain, and promote digestive health. It can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infusing the leaves in hot water to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
